revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:CSS3 multiple column layout]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:CSS3 multiple column layout]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
revision.text:
{| class="wikitable" style="float:right;clear:right;font-size:85%;margin:0 0 1em 1em;text-align:center;line-height:1.25em;" |+ style="line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.25em;"| CSS3 multiple-column layout browser support |- ! Property !! [[Internet Explorer|Internet
Explorer]] !! [[Firefox]] !! [[Safari (web browser)|Safari]] !! [[Google Chrome|Chrome]] !! [[Opera (web browser)|Opera]] |- | column-width
column-count | {{yes|â‰Ą 10
(2012)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 1.5
(2005)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 3
(2007)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 1
(2008)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 11.1
(2011)}} |- | columns | {{yes|â‰Ą 10

(2016)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 65
(2016)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 15
(2013)}} |- |colspan="6" style="text-align:right"|{{navbar|CSS3 multiple column layout|mini=y}} |} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
revision.text:
{| class="wikitable" style="float:right;clear:right;font-size:85%;margin:0 0 1em 1em;text-align:center;line-height:1.25em;" |+ style="line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.25em;"| CSS3 multiple-column layout browser support |- ! Property !! [[Internet Explorer|Internet
Explorer]] !! [[Firefox]] !! [[Safari (web browser)|Safari]] !! [[Google Chrome|Chrome]] !! [[Opera (web browser)|Opera]] |- | column-width
column-count | {{yes|â‰Ą 10
(2012)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 1.5
(2005)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 3
(2007)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 1
(2008)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 11.1
(2011)}} |- | columns | {{yes|â‰Ą 10
(2012)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 9
(2011)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 3
(2007)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 1
(2008)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 11.1
(2011)}} |- | break-before
break-after
break-inside | {{yes|â‰Ą 10
(2012)}} || {{maybe|â‰Ą 65
(2019)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 10
(2016)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 65
(2016)}} || {{yes|â‰Ą 15
(2013)}} |- |colspan="6" style="text-align:right"|{{navbar|CSS3 multiple column layout|mini=y}} |} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1284823413|1284823413]] by [[Special:Contributions/Alphachart|Alphachart]] ([[User talk:Alphachart|talk]]) broke template;

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CSS3_multiple_column_layout here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
